attacking_style: Not a natural attacker; operates opportunistically in breakaways with calculated tactical awareness, particularly regarding bonus seconds and stage negotiations rather than explosive climbing attacks.
team_tactics: Appears to ride independently without heavy team support; personally marks dangerous moves rather than relying on domestiques to control threats.
terrain_preference: Shows unexpected climbing durability on medium-mountain stages, able to limit losses on hard climbs (12km+ remaining) better than profile suggests. Not suited for explosive summit finishes.
vulnerability: Loses contact on steep sustained climbs when pace intensifies with 10-15km remaining; lacks pure climbing firepower to stay with elite GC contenders on high-mountain finishes.
key_patterns: Demonstrates tactical maturity beyond GC debut status, negotiating breakaway outcomes strategically (2 instances)
Shows personal responsibility for race positioning, marking attacks individually without team support (2 instances)
Exceeds expectations as non-climber on mountainous terrain, limiting time losses effectively (2 instances)
form_trajectory: positive: consistently exceeded expectations for GC debut rider across multiple mountain stages, showing both climbing durability and tactical sophistication
